events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: kick-out flashing missing at roof-wall intersection. Work is in-progress. Flashing & WRB integration. IRC R703 requires flashing at roof-wall intersections, including kick-out flashing. Missing kick-out flashing is a sequence violation - it should be installed before or integrated with WRB and siding. This is non-compliant and defective.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, defective)
Risk: high (water intrusion at roof-wall can cause major damage)
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 50
Value: 0
Confidence: 0.9
Order: proper sequence would be WRB, then flashing (including kick-out), then siding
Findings: kick-out flashing missing at roof-wall intersection
Actions: install kick-out flashing before continuing siding/finishing
References: IRC R703, mfrinstructions
